name: BrSt Daily Breakout
description: Short-term breakout candidates: price is coiling just below a daily resistance level that has been tested several times. A genuine breakout is confirmed when recent volume is significantly higher than the 50-day average volume, which indicates institutional (MF / FII / DII) buying rather than retail speculation.

data._comment: Daily OHLCV history pulled (and reused from the NSE 1Day store when available). Daily volume is required for the 50-day average volume confirmation.

resistance._comment: Price must be within max_distance_from_high_pct of the 6-month high. A 'test' is a day whose high is within test_zone_pct of the highest high. Tests within test_grouping_bars trading days count as one touch event. At least min_distinct_tests separate touches are required.

volume_confirmation._comment: Baseline = average daily volume over the average_window_days that precede the most recent recent_lookback_days. Recent = the highest daily volume within the last recent_lookback_days. volume_ratio = recent / baseline. The candidate is volume-confirmed when volume_ratio >= min_breakout_volume_multiple. When require_for_match is true, candidates without volume confirmation are dropped; when false they are still returned but flagged so you can sort / filter on them.
